attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$GGACML.CDC_GL_LEDGERS)

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGdb.STG_CDC_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS AS STG_CDC_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS,
 (
 select LEDGER_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGdb.STG_CDC_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS
 minus
 select LEDGER_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMdb.CDC_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.LEDGER_ID = STG_CDC_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS.LEDGER_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CDC_GL_SETS_OF_BOOKS.REFRESH_DATETIME
